allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/markets/cn_a" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 20; "OK status=$\($r.StatusCode\) len=$\($r.Content.Length\)" } catch { "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 20; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/markets/cn_a" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "OK status=$\($r.StatusCode\) len=$\($r.Content.Length\)" } catch { "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
